## Describe the bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `pim ...`
2. Select ...
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error output.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]
- CLI version: [e.g. v1.0.0 or commit hash]
- Go version: [e.g. 1.24]
- Azure CLI version: [e.g. 2.67.0]

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or log output.
